mxCell.value:
CAKE AUCTION WEBSITE — FULL SYSTEM MAP v3
School Trip Fundraiser | Mobile-First | Real-Time Bidding | Zero-Friction

1. AUTHENTICATION

• Rolling 6-digit passcode = today's date (MMDDYY)
→ e.g. 4/6/26 = 040626
• Device trusted for 30 days via secure cookie
• No username / no account creation needed
• Passcode changes daily — old devices stay valid 30 days

2. AUCTION MANAGEMENT (Multiple Auctions)

• Create multiple auctions (e.g. "Spring Bake Sale", "Fall Festival")
• Set public-viewable date/time (pre-auction preview)
• Set bidding-opens date/time (go-live)
• Set bidding-closes date/time
• "Copy to Calendar" button generates .ics for public

3. CAKE / ITEM MANAGEMENT

• Add cakes with: name, flavor/description, photo(s)
• Who donated the cake
• Which kid / cause proceeds benefit
• Set starting price per item OR same for all
• Set min & max bid increment (buttons auto-generate)
• Items appear on public page as they're added (if auction published)

4. LIVE BID MONITOR (Admin View)

Per-cake expandable bid ledger showing:

┌────────────┬──────────────┬────────┬──────────────────┐
│ Bidder │ Phone │ Amount │ Timestamp │
├────────────┼──────────────┼────────┼──────────────────┤
│ Sarah M. │ (305) 555-1234 │ $45.00 │ 2:14:37.482 PM │
│ Mike T. │ (786) 555-9876 │ $35.00 │ 2:13:22.119 PM │
│ Sarah M. │ (305) 555-1234 │ $25.00 │ 2:11:05.773 PM │
└────────────┴──────────────┴────────┴──────────────────┘

• Phone numbers visible — admin can call winners/no-shows
• Millisecond timestamps for dispute resolution
• Real-time updates via WebSocket — same as public
• Tap phone number to call directly (mobile admin)

5. RULES & SETTINGS (Editable)

• Pickup window (e.g. "30 min after close")
• No-show policy → next highest bidder contacted
• Pickup date / time / location info
• Custom rules text (admin can add/edit freely)

6. POST-AUCTION REPORTS

• Per-kid fundraising totals | Grand total haul
• Winner list with phone numbers (for pickup/no-show contact)
• Full bid history export (with millisecond timestamps)
• Exportable CSV/PDF for organizer records

1. PRE-AUCTION PREVIEW (No Login)

• Visible once admin publishes (before go-live)
• Browse cakes as they're added in real time
• See: cake photo, name, donor, beneficiary kid
• See: starting price, auction go-live date/time
• "Copy to My Calendar" button (.ics download)
• View auction rules
• Bid buttons disabled / grayed out until go-live

2. BIDDER REGISTRATION (On First Bid Only)

• Triggered ONLY when user first taps a bid button
• Modal: Name + Phone Number
• No email, no credit card, no account
• Stored in device cookie / localStorage
• All future bids auto-tied to this device
• Phone visible to admin only (not shown publicly)
• "Not you? Tap to change" option

3. LIVE BIDDING (During Auction Window)

• Cake card shows: photo, current high bid, high bidder name
• Preset bid buttons auto-calculated from admin's
min/max increment (e.g. +$5, +$10, +$15, +$25)
• One-tap bidding — no typing amounts
• "Proceeds go to: [Kid Name]'s trip fund"
• "Donated by: [Donor Name]"
• Countdown timer to auction close
• All updates pushed instantly via WebSocket

4. BID HISTORY PER CAKE (Public View)

Expandable bid list on each cake card:

┌────────────┬────────┬─────────────┐
│ Bidder │ Amount │ Time │
├────────────┼────────┼─────────────┤
│ Sarah M. │ $45.00 │ 2:14 PM │
│ Mike T. │ $35.00 │ 2:13 PM │
│ Sarah M. │ $25.00 │ 2:11 PM │
│ Jenny R. │ $15.00 │ 2:08 PM │
└────────────┴────────┴─────────────┘

• No phone numbers shown (privacy — admin only)
• Time shown to the minute (no seconds/ms)
• Updates instantly across all devices via WebSocket
• Outbid someone you know? They'll see it immediately!

5. RESULTS & PICKUP (After Auction Closes)

• Winners displayed per cake
• Per-kid fundraising totals shown publicly
• Grand total raised displayed prominently
• Thank you message to all bidders
• Pickup instructions: date, time, location
• Rules reminder (pickup window, no-show policy)

PUBLISHED
Public can view
Items added live
No bidding yet

FRONTEND (React / Next.js)

• /admin — passcode gate → dashboard
• /auction/[id] — public auction page
• /auction/[id]/results — post-close results
• Mobile-first responsive layout
• Cake card grid with photo, info, bid buttons
• Preset bid buttons (from min/max increment)
• Per-cake bid history list (expandable)
• Bidder registration modal (name + phone)
• Device cookie for returning bidders
• Countdown timer component
• "Copy to Calendar" .ics generator
• WebSocket client for instant updates

NETLIFY FUNCTIONS (API LAYER)

• POST /api/auth — validate MMDDYY passcode
→ set 30-day device cookie
• CRUD /api/auctions — create, list, update status
• CRUD /api/cakes — add items, set prices/increments
• POST /api/bids — validate, save with ms timestamp
• GET /api/bids/[cake_id] — full bid history
• POST /api/upload — proxy photo to ImgBB
• POST /api/bidders — register name + phone
• GET /api/results/[auction_id] — winners, totals
• CRUD /api/rules — admin-editable rules text
• GET /api/calendar/[id] — .ics file

BID BUTTON GENERATION LOGIC

Admin sets: min_increment=$5, max_increment=$25
→ System generates: +$5 | +$10 | +$15 | +$25
Each button = current_high_bid + increment | Disabled if not LIVE

DEVICE-TIED IDENTITY

First bid tap → modal → Name + Phone → cookie set
All subsequent bids auto-attributed | No login ever
Admin cookie: separate 30-day trust token
CI/CD: GitHub push to main → Netlify auto-builds & deploys

WEBSOCKET / SSE SERVER
(Netlify Edge Function or Ably/Pusher)

• Every new bid → broadcast to ALL connected devices
• Payload: cake_id, bidder_name, amount, timestamp
• Admin channel: includes phone + millisecond precision
• Public channel: name + amount + time (minute only)
• New cake added → push to all viewers in pre-auction
• Auction state change → push to all (LIVE, CLOSED)

WHY REAL-TIME MATTERS

Without instant sync, a bidder could see stale data
and think they're winning when they've been outbid.

Every bid, every device, instantly.

Options (in order of simplicity):
1. Ably or Pusher — managed WebSocket service
(free tier likely covers school auction traffic)
2. Supabase Realtime — if using Supabase layer
3. SSE via Netlify Edge — server-sent events
ADMIN vs. PUBLIC — BID HISTORY VIEWS

PUBLIC VIEW (Fun + Competitive)

┌───────────┬────────┬──────────────┐
│ Bidder │ Amount │ Time │
├───────────┼────────┼──────────────┤
│ Sarah M. │ $45.00 │ 2:14 PM │
│ Mike T. │ $35.00 │ 2:13 PM │
│ Sarah M. │ $25.00 │ 2:11 PM │
│ Jenny R. │ $15.00 │ 2:08 PM │
└───────────┴────────┴──────────────┘

✓ See who you're bidding against
✓ No phone numbers (privacy)
✓ Time to the minute only (no seconds)
✓ Fuels friendly competition!

GITHUB
Source Code Repository

• Frontend + components
• Netlify functions
• DB migration scripts
• .env config (secrets in Netlify)

NEON DATABASE (Serverless PostgreSQL)

auctions — id, title, description, preview_at, live_at, close_at, status,
pickup_date, pickup_time, pickup_location, thank_you_msg
cakes — id, auction_id, name, flavor, description, donor_name,
beneficiary_kid, imgbb_url, starting_price, min_increment, max_increment
bidders — id, name, phone, device_token, created_at
bids — id, cake_id, bidder_id, amount, timestamp (TIMESTAMPTZ w/ ms precision)
rules — id, auction_id, rule_text, sort_order
admin_sessions — device_token, authenticated_at, expires_at

IMGBB.COM
Image Hosting API

• Admin uploads cake photo
• API returns public CDN URL
• URL stored in cakes.imgbb_url
• Public page loads from CDN

.ICS CALENDAR FILE
Generated on-the-fly by API
Auction title, go-live time, link
Apple / Google / Outlook compatible
<font style="font-size:9px">SQL — auctions, cakes, bids (w/ ms timestamps), bidders (w/ phone), rules</font>

Stack: GitHub → Netlify → Neon PostgreSQL → ImgBB → Ably/Pusher (WebSocket) | Auth: MMDDYY passcode, 30-day device trust | Bidder ID: Name + phone on first bid, device-tied | Real-time: Every bid pushes to every device instantly | Privacy: Phone visible to admin only; public sees name + time (min)
